title: Discipline-Layer Grind — wgclw
mission: Re-architect the discipline layer around an event-sourced grind runtime; retire the bookkeeper agent and the hand-written ORCHESTRATION-STATE.md. Out of scope: PDLC-orchestrator design, PORT-track machine setup.

protocols.session_grants: one worktree per lane; no cross-lane writes

Amend the renderer spec's UX section with the chosen design

attention.text: PR #346 reviewer stalemate — codex round 4 on unchanged head 9f31c2e with zero open threads. Merge ruling needed.

observations.message: Six codex rounds on PR #341 each found real defects — a high round count is reviewer health, not loop smell; stalemate is the only bad signal.
Hand-merged state drifted twice when lieutenants reported deltas out of order; refold-from-zero makes report order irrelevant.
lane_handover recorded on lane-watchers: lt-watchers → lt-watchers-2 (haiku·low → sonnet·low), reason: context exhaustion.
stale_item condition fired for disc-2 — no events referencing it for 47m (threshold 45m).
Anomaly: review_round head_sha 4b1a9d0 disagrees with review_verdict head_sha 4b1a9d1 for wgclw.30.1 round 2 — recorded applied:false; counts use the latest event.
